series_metadata.series_title: O.R.C. 323.152 (homestead reduction in taxable value) memoranda
series_metadata.series_description: Memoranda (O.R.C. 323.152(A)(1)(d)) identifying the adjustment o the total income threshold (O.R.C. 323.152(A)(1)(b)(iii)) and any spreadsheets, data, and/or calculations identifying the adjustment.
